seoParkingPrices.kicker: M Park Sarajevo · private parking near Sarajevo Airport
seoParkingPrices.h1: Sarajevo Airport parking prices – tiers, what’s included, and how to book
intro: When you search for Sarajevo Airport parking, you usually want two things first: a predictable daily cost and no surprise charges after your trip. M Park Sarajevo uses three simple tiers—9 KM/day for 1–9 days, 8 KM/day for 10–14 days, and 7 KM/day from day 15—near Sarajevo Airport so you know what you pay before you drop off your car.

This guide explains how our tariffs work for travellers, what is bundled into the rate (including CCTV and a complimentary ride to the terminal), and why booking ahead beats scrambling for space during peak travel windows.

sections.h2: How to read our parking tiers
paragraphs: Parking is both a cost and a logistics decision: while you fly, your vehicle should stay in a controlled area with clear accountability. Our rate depends on the length of stay—1–9 days at 9 KM/day, 10–14 days at 8 KM/day, and from day 15 at 7 KM/day.
What matters is what’s included: at M Park Sarajevo, CCTV and an organised airport transfer are part of the offer so you are not hunting last‑minute solutions by the terminal.
You can also see live tier ranges and a quote on the homepage booking form—use this page when you want context before you reserve.
Stay length is the main driver: enter accurate arrival and departure date/time so the quote matches your trip.
Capacity and key‑handover options can affect availability for specific slots—our team keeps capacity disciplined so every traveller gets a confirmed spot.
Bundled services (monitoring, organised access, transfer to Sarajevo Airport) add value compared with paying for parking and transport separately downtown.

sections.h2: Why reserve airport parking in advance
paragraphs: Reserving locks in your space and reduces stress before early flights or busy weekends.
You also receive clear directions to Kasindolskih Žrtava 18 and confirmations before travel.
If plans change, reach out early—extensions are easiest when we know ahead of pickup.
Transparent tiers mean fewer misunderstandings at pickup.
Transfers are included so Sarajevo Airport stays reachable without extra parking stress.
Combine this guide with our transfer and booking pages when planning multi‑leg trips.

faqStructured.question: What is the daily parking rate?
faqStructured.answer: KM 9/day for 1–9 days, KM 8 for 10–14 days, KM 7 from day 15. The booking form quotes your exact stay instantly.

faqStructured.question: Is the shuttle included in the price?
faqStructured.answer: Yes — complimentary transfer to Sarajevo Airport is bundled with your parking stay.

faqStructured.question: Are there hidden fees?
faqStructured.answer: Shuttle and CCTV are included. You see the total estimate in the form before submitting.

faqStructured.question: How do longer stays reduce cost?
faqStructured.answer: From day 10 the rate drops to KM 8/day; from day 15 to KM 7/day. See the long-term parking guide for multi-week trips.

faqStructured.question: How do I book at these rates?
faqStructured.answer: Use the online reservation form for an instant quote and email confirmation — or call/WhatsApp +387 61 512 152 with questions.

seoFaqAirport.h1: Sarajevo airport parking — frequently asked questions
intro: Quick answers for people who already picked travel dates but want clarity before arriving: how early to book, how our shuttle fits the stay, realistic driving time to the terminal, vehicle security, payment, delays, and what overnight coverage means.
For tariff detail use the pricing guide; for choosing between providers read the comparison page. Reservations run through the booking form linked from every page.

paragraphs: Exact pickup points, key handovers, or payment timing are always confirmed with your booking because night flights and long stays sometimes need tailoring.
Our yard is at Kasindolskih Žrtava 18, near Sarajevo Airport — CCTV-covered with a shuttle ride to the terminal included for stays booked here.
The homepage estimator shows tiers: KM 9 / day for 1–9 days, KM 8 / day for 10–14, KM 7 / day from day 15 onward (convertible-mark pricing shown in the UI).

faqStructured.question: How far in advance should I book?
faqStructured.answer: As soon as you know dates and approximate arrival windows — holiday peaks fill faster. The online form returns an indicative quote instantly and sends email confirmation while we align capacity. If timing is tight, submit the form then call using the contacts on site.

faqStructured.question: Is there a shuttle to Sarajevo Airport?
faqStructured.answer: Yes. Shuttle from our lot to Sarajevo Airport terminals is bundled with parking so you skip hunting for roadside space beside the terminal before check-in closes. Coordinators tie pickup timing to details in your booking and spell out meeting steps in the confirmation mail.

faqStructured.question: How long does the transfer take?
faqStructured.answer: It is a short drive and depends on ordinary traffic. Still follow airline check-in advice and passport-control buffers; combine our timeframe with carrier guidance especially on international itineraries.

faqStructured.question: Is the parking facility secure?
faqStructured.answer: We run controlled parking for travellers — organised entry plus CCTV, which beats leaving a car unattended on random curbsides for multi-day trips. Rules about keys and arrivals repeat in every reservation so expectations stay clear.

faqStructured.question: What if my flight is delayed or rescheduled?
faqStructured.answer: Message us promptly via phone/email from your confirmation. We try to reschedule shuttles or stretch the stay when bay capacity allows. Early honesty keeps pickup on return predictable.

faqStructured.question: How does reservation work?
faqStructured.answer: Complete the booking form online: arrivals, departure clocks, passenger contact, and key-storage choice where relevant. Automated email acknowledges receipt while staff verifies space. WhatsApp-only bookings are not accepted — paperwork stays tied to the form for everyone's clarity.

faqStructured.question: How do I pay?
faqStructured.answer: Collection moment (and whether cash/card) matches what we confirm alongside your personalised quote — no surprise line items beyond what the estimator already showed.

faqStructured.question: Are you staffed overnight?
faqStructured.answer: CCTV operates 24/7. Shuttle and key exchanges follow the hourly plan affirmed per reservation; overnight flights normally work fine when communicated through the booking flow.
